<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\FuncCall; use PhpParser\Node\Name; abstract class AbstractFunctionReplaceMutator extends AbstractMutator { public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [FuncCall::class]; } #[\Override] public static function can(Node $node): bool { if (! $node instanceof FuncCall) { return false; } if (! $node->name instanceof Name) { return false; } return $node->name->getParts() === [static::from()]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var FuncCall $node */ $node->name = new Name(static::to()); return $node; } abstract public static function from(): string; abstract public static function to(): string; }
